title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.250 - Specifications — bids — notice
text:
205.250.  Specifications — bids — notice. — No hospital buildings shall be erected or constructed until the plans and specifications have been made therefor and adopted by the board of hospital trustees, and bids advertised for according to law for other county public buildings.
(RSMo 1939 § 15199) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13982; 1919 § 12616
